message:
feat(search): support modern onnx/ subdir model layout with legacy fallback

The fastembed embedder now searches for ONNX model files in the modern
`onnx/model.onnx` subdirectory first, falling back to the legacy flat
`model.onnx` layout. This handles both HuggingFace model repository
layouts transparently via the new `select_model_file()` method.

Also hardens the L2-normalization step: detects NaN/Inf contamination
in embeddings and zeros them out to prevent poisoning similarity search
results. The previous code only checked for near-zero norms but would
propagate NaN/Inf silently. Uses multiply-by-inverse instead of
division for a minor performance improvement.

Adds four new unit tests covering model file selection preference,
legacy fallback, empty directory handling, and config_for() lookups.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
